feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Title: SAP Business One – Need Dynamic Account Determination Based on Transaction Type (Purchase vs
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue in SAP Business One regarding account determination for a finished product.

This item is set as a finished product (it can be purchased, sold, and stored). By default, the stock and inventory variance accounts are linked to finished goods. The problem arises when I purchase this product: I want the system to post it using raw material accounts (stock and variance), not finished goods accounts.

I have used the extended account determination to solve this for purchase and sales documents, and that part works fine. However, for stock movements, SAP B1 strictly uses the accounts linked to the warehouse setup, regardless of the item's nature or the transaction context.

My objective is this:

  • When the item is purchased, it should affect raw material stock and variance accounts.

  • When the same item is sold or used in production, it should post to finished goods stock and variance accounts.

Currently, this is not possible due to how stock accounts are determined at the warehouse level in SAP B1.

Has anyone found a solution or workaround to dynamically determine G/L accounts based on the origin of the transaction (e.g., purchase vs. sales/production)? Ideally, the accounting should reflect the correct nature of the transaction while keeping the same item.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Unit Price not showing for an item during Inventory Transfer PLD
entry.content:
Hello Community,
Please guide in this , performed Inventory Transfer and when fetching the last item system is not fetching automatically any price for that item for which the Unit Price in the layout is coming blank, need a way to troubleshoot it.

Thank you.

entry.title: Inventory In Warehouse Detailed Report Confirmed Column Field
entry.content:
Hi All

What is this Inventory Warehouse Report Detailed Confirmed Column Field information from Item Master Data? 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: AP DOWN PAYMENT ERROR IN SAP BUSINESS ONE
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We have SAP Business One  with version 10.0 . We  face error  with respect to AP down payment request and needs your assistance to resolve . The following are the few cases of previous years where the audit is over .

  1.  We had paid some advance amount against a PO through AP down payment request. Since the Vendor has not done the work and could not return the payment, we had to written off the amount and adjusted the advance through Journal entry in SAP . But we could not reconcile as we get the error message that only AP invoice against the PO can be reconciled with the advance payment. 
  2. We had paid   100% of the value of the PO   value as advance amount against a PO through AP down payment request. But while  the vendor has supplied the  materials with the value of the invoice is little less than the advance paid . The shortage is likely coin adjustment and passed the JE . we tried to adjust with JE , but we are getting the error.
  3. We had paid full value of one PO  as advance amount against that  PO through AP down payment request. But vendor supplied part of the PO initially. But we adjusted the balance advance amount against one of the other PO/AP Invoice. The vendor account shows no due. But we are not able to reconcile because the error shows as we cannot reconcile a payment made against AP down payment request with other AP.

 

We have many such cases. How to resolve it . Is there any way out in SAP Business One  . 

Regards

 

Yogish Shenoy

9740170666

entry.title: Get Selected Value in Combobox Column (Grid Object)
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I created a ComboBox column in my grid object using the following line of code:

Grid0.Columns.Item(8).Type = SAPbouiCOM.BoGridColumnType.gct_ComboBox;

 

I have a DataTable and a grid.

I call the ExecuteQuery() method on DataSources.DataTable and then transform the column type to ComboBox. Additionally, I am populating the field with valid values.

The problem is: how can I retrieve the value selected by the user on the screen? When I select a value from the list, the field remains null (nothing is selected).

The user will open the list of valid values and select one of them. I tried to create a UserDataSource to bind the column, but I believe that's not possible for grid objects.

How can I display the ComboBox and fill the field with the value selected by the user?

 

I tried this code above, but it shows the error {"Valid Value - Value does not Exist [66000-62]"}

Thanks!

entry.title: Support user error. Your session has expired and SAP Business One will close automatically.
entry.content:
Hi All,
We are having this issue where a support consultant gets this error when he logs in:


I log in with the same user, Support, but I dont have that issue on my side.  The only difference is that he is working on a terminal server, whereas I have the client installed on my pc. 
I restarted the RSP service, ran and uploaded the SSR again, but the issue still persists on his side.
Has anyone had this issue before? Please assist.

Regards,
Jerusha

entry.title: Deletion log
entry.content:
Good morning, everyone, how are you?

I’m building a data mesh with my SAP data, and I ran into an issue.

As a strategy, I used Kafka to collect my inserts and updates in real time. After that, the data is sent to BigQuery.

I had a case where a user created a purchase order with 5 lines, but the next day she deleted 4 of them.

Is there any type of record that shows me the deleted lines?

How does SAP B1 build the SELECT statement for the modification logs? Because in the system, I can see when a line was removed.

Thank you for your help.
Best regards,

entry.title: Inventory Opening Balance DTW to be imported as DRAFT
entry.content:
Hi guys,
accordingly with KB Note 3378584 I'm trying  to execute the DTW but I would to import in DRAFT mode.

The note doesn't mention anything about and the XLT model OIQI-InventoryOpeningBalance (neither the child file) doesn't have any column referencing to DRAFT where to set tYES/tNO for DRAFT mode.

Please, have you any idea if is it possible or not?

Thank you!

entry.title: Failed to Update Outgoing Payments with Error Message 'Unbalanced Cash flow Assignment'
entry.content:
Hi, I'm trying to update a UDF in the Outgoing Payments. However, the update failed with this error message "Unbalanced Cash flow Assignment".

Actions Done:

1. Checked the Transaction and it has a tagged Primary Form Item.

2. Checked the Cash Account and it is set as Cash Flow Relevant with an appropriate Cash Flow Category.

3. Checked the Cash Flow Reference Report and the transaction has been assigned.

 Database is SAP HANA Version 10 PL 02

 

What are the possible causes?

entry.title: Cannot create production order via DIAPI
entry.content:
I try to create production order via DIAPI on SAP B1 10.0 SP 2411.

but it shows error when I submit the request 

                <a:ErrCode>-1116</a:ErrCode>
                <a:ErrMsg>Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction</a:ErrMsg>
 
and below is my coding, please help to suggest.
 

oDoc = oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oProductionOrders)
oDoc.Series = Get_SeriesNumber("202", Me.SeriesName)

oDoc.ProductionOrderType = SAPbobsCOM.BoProductionOrderTypeEnum.bopotSpecial
oDoc.ProductionOrderStatus = SAPbobsCOM.BoProductionOrderStatusEnum.boposPlanned

If Me.TransactionDate IsNot Nothing Then oDoc.PostingDate = Me.TransactionDate.Value
If Me.TransactionDate IsNot Nothing Then oDoc.StartDate = Me.TransactionDate.Value
If Me.DueDate IsNot Nothing Then oDoc.DueDate = Me.DueDate.Value
oDoc.Remarks = Me.Comments

oDoc.ItemNo = Me.ProductNo
oDoc.PlannedQuantity = 1
oDoc.Warehouse = "ABO"


oDoc.Lines.ItemType = SAPbobsCOM.ProductionItemType.pit_Item
oDoc.Lines.ItemNo = "RSVBUCE"
oDoc.Lines.PlannedQuantity = 1
oDoc.Lines.BaseQuantity = 1
oDoc.Lines.Warehouse = "ABO"
oDoc.Lines.Add()


RetVal = oDoc.Add


If RetVal <> 0 Then
'Write Error
oCompany.GetLastError(_lErrCode, _sErrMsg)
_Log.ErrorFormat("Error Code: {0}, Message: {1}, TransNo.: {2}", lErrCode, sErrMsg, Me.TransactionNo)
_ReturnDTO = New PDReturnDTO With {
.SAPB1PONo = "",
.TransactionNo = Me.TransactionNo,
.ErrCode = lErrCode,
.ErrMsg = sErrMsg}

Else
'Write successfully
xDocEntry = oCompany.GetNewObjectKey()
HasTransNo("OWOR")

_Log.InfoFormat("AddNew Successfully: {0}", Me.TransactionNo)
_ReturnDTO = New PDReturnDTO With {
.SAPB1PONo = Me._SAPDocNum,
.TransactionNo = Me.TransactionNo,
.ErrCode = 0,
.ErrMsg = "",
.SAPB1DOCEntry = Me._SAPDocEntry}
End If

entry.title: SLD, License and Extension Manager Error Installing SAP Business One SP2502 SQL Version
entry.content:
I want to upgrade SAP from SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.191) FP 2202 (64-bit) to SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.191) FP 2502 (64-bit).

Getting error during upgrade, please advise how to fix this error.

entry.title: Error "Money Overflow; cannot display all digits"
entry.content:
In SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2111, I recently started using bin locations for stock management. However, I encountered the following error in a specific bin location:

"Error "Money Overflow; cannot display all digits" (ODBC -104) [7001-21]"

This error occurs only in one particular bin location (row), and as a result, I’m blocked from performing any stock operations (such as transfers or adjustments) with the items stored there.

How can I fix this issue?

entry.title: Auto printing issue while adding marketting documents
entry.content: Apparently I am facing the issue where when Ar credit memo is being added,it automatically prints without even giving me chance to preview the layout.surprisingly that that only happens with AR credit memo document.I have a checked the settings (document settings) under administration and print when adding checkbox is still unchecked.Can anyone help me to solve the issue.I don't want to print at credit memo layout directly while adding the document

entry.title: hello
entry.content: I want to design purhcase qutotation comparison report using crystal report.i am currently using HANA As db.can anyone help me how to go about designing this layout.i tried using cross tab but somehow i was not able to get correct display.

entry.title: Data Transfer Workbench (DTW) dependencies on MS Access 2010 database engine
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently setting up SAP B1 Data Transfer Workbench (DTW) and noticed it requires the Microsoft Access Database Engine 2010 to function properly.

I’d like to ask:

  • Is DTW strictly tied to the 2010 version of the engine?

  • Has anyone successfully used a newer version (like 2019 or 2021 or 2024) without issues?

  • Are there known compatibility problems if using anything other than 2010?

I’m trying to avoid installing older runtime packages unless absolutely necessary, especially since the 2010 version has reached end-of-life (EOL) and our security department strongly discourages the use of unsupported software.

Any suggestions or workarounds or alternatives tools/technologies would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your insights!

entry.title: Problem activating Support user via SLD or RSP
entry.content:
Dear Sirs,

We are experiencing an issue when activating the support user via either the Remote Support Platform (RSP) or directly from the System Landscape Directory (SLD).

After activating the support user, if we try to log in to SAP Business One immediately, we receive the following error message:
"To log on as a support user, ensure that the support user is already activated in the System Landscape Directory (SLD)."

We are forced to wait approximately 30 minutes before the user can successfully log in.

Our environment is:
• SAP Business One 10.0 FP2505
• SQL Server 2019

We would like to know if this issue has been experienced by other users and if anyone has found a solution.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

entry.title: SLD does not update the company list even though the SRGC table is correct
entry.content:
Hi, I'm facing a persistent issue with the System Landscape Directory (SLD) in SAP Business One.

When I log into the SAP B1 client and click on "Change Company", then hit "Refresh", the list of companies either disappears or shows outdated information. If I switch between the available SQL servers (SQL 2012 and SQL 2014), the list reappears, but it does not reflect recent changes (e.g., deleted databases still appear or new ones are missing).

I've already checked the SRGC table in the SBO-COMMON database, and it contains the correct and up-to-date company information. However, the SLD still shows outdated entries.

I also accessed the SLD through the web browser, and the issue is the same: it does not show the actual list of available databases.

I'm considering removing and re-registering the SQL server in the SLD, but I'm unsure whether this might affect any configuration or deployment.

Has anyone experienced this issue?

  • What file or process does SAP use to rebuild the company list from the SQL instance?

  • Is it safe to remove and re-add the server in the SLD?

  • How can I force the SLD to resync properly with SBO-COMMON?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: error while using DTW
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want update column UDF with Name: U_MonthSchool of Journal Entry(OJDT). However, when import DTW error: Invalid valid value '' in Enum ‘BoYesNoEnum’, the valid values are ‘N’, ‘Y’.
Please help me ! Thanks you a lot.

entry.title: Cannot change Document Owner in SAP Business One version 10
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it confirm only Super User manager and Support User can change posted Sales transaction Document Owner?

I tested granted Full Authorization and Data Ownership, removed Sales Employee in SAP User Employee Master, reset a non Super User to Super User in a different testing database and still encounter wierd database error 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: AWS system-reboot
entry.content: We currently have a SAP B1 9.3 MSSQL runnings in AWS. AWS has a scheduled "system-reboot" that will happen in 2 days, the AI in AWS says that our host will change as a consequence of said "system-reboot" how will that affect the license currently set in our SAP B1 9.3? If ever the "system-reboot" changes our hardware key can we still use it? even temporarily while awaiting for our partner to issue us a new license based on the new hardware key?
